---
title: "wrap_it_up.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\tools\wrap_it_up.py"
loc: 226
complexity: 27
logic_score: 0.50
style_score: 3.71
intel_score: 5.29
overall_score: 2.08
---

## Intent
The `wrap_it_up.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on SovereignWrapper, __init__, _get_engine, initial_scan, release_ravens, wait_for_ravens, run_gungnir_gate, synchronize_state, _edda_sync, review_technical_debt, sovereign_commit, teardown, main. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via SovereignWrapper, __init__, _get_engine, initial_scan, release_ravens, wait_for_ravens, run_gungnir_gate, synchronize_state, _edda_sync, review_technical_debt, sovereign_commit, teardown, main. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.5/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.7/10
- **Intel [I]**: 5.3/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 56 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [gc](file://gc)
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [time](file://time)
- [datetime](file://datetime)
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)
- [src.core.engine.atomic_gpt](file://src.core.engine.atomic_gpt)
- [src.core.sovereign_hud](file://src.core.sovereign_hud)
- [src.core.sv_engine](file://src.core.sv_engine)
- [src.tools.update_gemini_manifest](file://src.tools.update_gemini_manifest)
- [src.tools.compile_session_traces](file://src.tools.compile_session_traces)

### Exports
- `SovereignWrapper`
- `__init__`
- `_get_engine`
- `initial_scan`
- `release_ravens`
- `wait_for_ravens`
- `run_gungnir_gate`
- `synchronize_state`
- `_edda_sync`
- `review_technical_debt`
- `sovereign_commit`
- `teardown`
- `main`
